original_image_tags: A low-quality, upside-down scan of a single typed government document page on aged, yellowed paper with two hole-punches at the top. The page contains a memo with several official stamps and handwritten annotations.
Several official stamps are visible on the lower half of the document, some upside down relative to the main text.

elements.description: The page contains only typed text and standard administrative stamps/handwritten annotations. There are no distinct visual elements such as photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts present. The stamps include 'ESPIONAGE', 'REC'D F B T', 'NOV 22', 'INDEXED', 'RECD - FOREIGN LIAISON', and 'EMANSON SECTION, FBI'.

judge.reason: Description B states specific, detailed stamp text that is absent from Description A, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and content of verifiable visual elements.
